requirement_topic.en: Market Access — RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), Certificate of Conformity + S-Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）、合格证书 + 标准标志（S-Mark）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）、合格證書 + 標準標誌（S-Mark）

summary.en: Regulated products imported into Rwanda — including household electrical appliances such as refrigerators — must clear the Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme and obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) before customs clearance. PVoC is operated through RSB-appointed inspection bodies in the country of export, and conformity is assessed against the applicable Rwanda Standards (RS), which are predominantly national adoptions of IEC/ISO standards. Depending on the route, conformity may be demonstrated per-consignment, by product registration, or via a licence; products meeting requirements may carry the RSB Standards Mark (S-Mark). There is no single CE-equivalent self-declared mark — a third-party CoC issued under PVoC is the operative document at the border. Importers should be registered in Rwanda and the consignment must be accompanied by the CoC; goods arriving without a valid CoC face destination inspection, penalty fees, or rejection.
summary.zh: 进口至卢旺达的受管制产品——包括电冰箱等家用电器——须在清关前通过卢旺达标准局（RSB）出口前合格评定（PVoC）计划并取得合格证书（CoC）。PVoC通过RSB在出口国指定的查验机构运作，合格性依据适用的卢旺达标准（RS）评定，这些标准大多为IEC/ISO标准的国家采纳。视路径而定，合格性可按每批货物、产品注册或许可证方式证明；符合要求的产品可加贴RSB标准标志（S-Mark）。不存在单一等同于CE的自我声明标志——依据PVoC签发的第三方合格证书是边境处的实际操作文件。进口商应在卢旺达注册，货物须随附合格证书；无有效合格证书到港的货物将面临目的地查验、罚款或退运。
summary.zht: 進口至盧旺達的受管制產品——包括電冰箱等家用電器——須在清關前通過盧旺達標準局（RSB）出口前合格評定（PVoC）計畫並取得合格證書（CoC）。PVoC通過RSB在出口國指定的查驗機構運作，合格性依據適用的盧旺達標準（RS）評定，這些標準大多為IEC/ISO標準的國家採納。視路徑而定，合格性可按每批貨物、產品註冊或許可證方式證明；符合要求的產品可加貼RSB標準標誌（S-Mark）。不存在單一等同於CE的自我聲明標誌——依據PVoC簽發的第三方合格證書是邊境處的實際操作文件。進口商應在盧旺達註冊，貨物須隨附合格證書；無有效合格證書到港的貨物將面臨目的地查驗、罰款或退運。

standards_or_laws: RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — mandatory third-party conformity assessment for regulated imports, operated via RSB-appointed inspection bodies
RSB Certificate of Conformity (CoC) — operative border document; required for customs clearance of regulated goods
RSB Standards Mark (S-Mark) — conformity mark for products meeting Rwanda Standards (RS)
Rwanda Standards (RS) — predominantly national adoptions of IEC/ISO standards (e.g., RS/IEC 60335 series, RS/IEC 62552 series)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; like Rwanda's PVoC it is third-party (not self-declared), but it is a domestic market-access instrument tied to GB standards and the Chinese market. A CCC certificate does not produce a Rwanda Certificate of Conformity; it is, at best, supporting evidence whose underlying test reports (especially IECEE CB Scheme reports referencing the IEC base standard) may be accepted within the PVoC assessment.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），并需中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；与卢旺达PVoC同为第三方（非自我声明），但其为绑定GB标准和中国市场的国内市场准入工具。CCC证书不能产生卢旺达合格证书；其充其量为支撑证据，其底层检测报告（尤其是引用IEC基础标准的IECEE CB体系报告）可能在PVoC评定中被接受。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），並需中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；與盧旺達PVoC同為第三方（非自我聲明），但其為綁定GB標準和中國市場的國內市場准入工具。CCC證書不能產生盧旺達合格證書；其充其量為支撐證據，其底層檢測報告（尤其是引用IEC基礎標準的IECEE CB體系報告）可能在PVoC評定中被接受。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: The market-access gap is procedural and per-consignment rather than a single one-time certification: (1) PVoC / CoC obligation — every regulated consignment to Rwanda generally needs a Certificate of Conformity issued under PVoC before it clears customs; a Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy this. The exporter must engage an RSB-appointed PVoC inspection body in China and assemble the conformity dossier (IEC-based test reports for safety, EMC, and energy) for each shipment or under a registration/licence route. (2) Standard basis — RSB assesses against RS standards that adopt IEC/ISO; GB-only reports may be insufficient, whereas IECEE CB Scheme reports referencing the IEC base standard are the cleanest evidence. (3) S-Mark and importer — products may need to bear the S-Mark and be brought in by a Rwanda-registered importer. (4) Verify the current PVoC route (consignment vs registration vs licence), appointed inspection bodies, and fee schedule with RSB before the first shipment, as these are periodically updated.
gap.zh: 市场准入差距在于程序性及按批次，而非单次一劳永逸的认证：（1）PVoC/CoC义务——每批运往卢旺达的受管制货物通常须在清关前取得依据PVoC签发的合格证书；中国CCC证书不能满足此要求。出口商须在中国委托RSB指定的PVoC查验机构，并就每批货物（或在注册/许可证路径下）汇编合格文件（安全、电磁兼容、能效的IEC基础检测报告）。（2）标准基准——RSB依据采纳IEC/ISO的RS标准评定；仅基于GB的报告可能不足，而引用IEC基础标准的IECEE CB体系报告为最清晰证据。（3）S-Mark与进口商——产品可能须加贴S-Mark并由卢旺达注册进口商引入。（4）首次出货前请向RSB核实现行PVoC路径（每批货物/注册/许可证）、指定查验机构及收费标准，因其会定期更新。
gap.zht: 市場准入差距在於程序性及按批次，而非單次一勞永逸的認證：（1）PVoC/CoC義務——每批運往盧旺達的受管制貨物通常須在清關前取得依據PVoC簽發的合格證書；中國CCC證書不能滿足此要求。出口商須在中國委託RSB指定的PVoC查驗機構，並就每批貨物（或在註冊/許可證路徑下）彙編合格文件（安全、電磁相容、能效的IEC基礎檢測報告）。（2）標準基準——RSB依據採納IEC/ISO的RS標準評定；僅基於GB的報告可能不足，而引用IEC基礎標準的IECEE CB體系報告為最清晰證據。（3）S-Mark與進口商——產品可能須加貼S-Mark並由盧旺達註冊進口商引入。（4）首次出貨前請向RSB核實現行PVoC路徑（每批貨物/註冊/許可證）、指定查驗機構及收費標準，因其會定期更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RSB PVoC and a Certificate of Conformity are required for regulated imports (including refrigerators) before customs clearance; S-Mark and a Rwanda-registered importer may also apply. Exact route to be confirmed with RSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; domestic instrument, not accepted as a Rwanda CoC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Rwanda for refrigerators runs through RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and a per-consignment Certificate of Conformity, not a self-declared CE-style mark. Chinese CCC does not produce a Rwanda CoC; the exporter must engage an RSB-appointed PVoC body and present IEC-based (ideally IECEE CB) test evidence, with possible S-Mark and a Rwanda-registered importer. verified:false — confirm the current PVoC route, appointed bodies, and fees with RSB before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱进入卢旺达市场须经RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）及按批次的合格证书，而非自我声明的类CE标志。中国CCC不能产生卢旺达合格证书；出口商须委托RSB指定的PVoC机构并提交基于IEC的检测证据（最好是IECEE CB），可能还需S-Mark及卢旺达注册进口商。verified:false——出货前请向RSB确认现行PVoC路径、指定机构及费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱進入盧旺達市場須經RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）及按批次的合格證書，而非自我聲明的類CE標誌。中國CCC不能產生盧旺達合格證書；出口商須委託RSB指定的PVoC機構並提交基於IEC的檢測證據（最好是IECEE CB），可能還需S-Mark及盧旺達註冊進口商。verified:false——出貨前請向RSB確認現行PVoC路徑、指定機構及費用。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer, Logistics via Mombasa / Dar es Salaam, and 230 V / 50 Hz Grid
requirement_topic.zh: 当地进口商、经蒙巴萨/达累斯萨拉姆的物流，及230 V/50 Hz电网
requirement_topic.zht: 當地進口商、經蒙巴薩/達累斯薩拉姆的物流，及230 V/50 Hz電網

summary.en: Rwanda is landlocked, so refrigerators are shipped to the ports of Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) and moved inland by road along the Northern or Central Corridor. Imports are handled by a Rwanda-registered importer who is the in-country responsible party for customs clearance, presentation of the RSB Certificate of Conformity, and any destination inspection. The Rwandan electricity grid is 230 V, 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz mains frequency as China, but a nominal voltage that differs from China's 220 V (single phase) / 380 V (three phase). Appliances should be rated and labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz operation, and the plug/socket system and cord should suit the Rwandan market (Type C / J / G are commonly encountered in the region; confirm the required plug type). Because the mains frequency matches China, compressor and motor designs are generally compatible; the voltage band and plug configuration are the items to verify on the rating plate and instructions.
summary.zh: 卢旺达为内陆国，因此电冰箱运往蒙巴萨（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）港，再经北部走廊或中部走廊公路内运。进口由卢旺达注册进口商办理，其为清关、出示RSB合格证书及任何目的地查验的当地责任方。卢旺达电网为230 V、50 Hz——与中国同为50 Hz市电频率，但标称电压与中国220 V（单相）/380 V（三相）不同。器具应按230 V/50 Hz运行额定并标识，插头/插座系统及电源线应适合卢旺达市场（该区域常见Type C/J/G；请确认所需插头类型）。由于市电频率与中国一致，压缩机及电机设计一般兼容；电压范围及插头配置是须在铭牌和说明书上核实的项目。
summary.zht: 盧旺達為內陸國，因此電冰箱運往蒙巴薩（肯尼亞）或達累斯薩拉姆（坦桑尼亞）港，再經北部走廊或中部走廊公路內運。進口由盧旺達註冊進口商辦理，其為清關、出示RSB合格證書及任何目的地查驗的當地責任方。盧旺達電網為230 V、50 Hz——與中國同為50 Hz市電頻率，但標稱電壓與中國220 V（單相）/380 V（三相）不同。器具應按230 V/50 Hz運行額定並標識，插頭/插座系統及電源線應適合盧旺達市場（該區域常見Type C/J/G；請確認所需插頭類型）。由於市電頻率與中國一致，壓縮機及電機設計一般相容；電壓範圍及插頭配置是須在銘牌和說明書上核實的項目。

standards_or_laws: Rwanda-registered importer — responsible economic operator for customs clearance and presentation of the RSB Certificate of Conformity
Logistics: ports of Mombasa (Kenya) / Dar es Salaam (Tanzania), inland by road (Northern / Central Corridor) — Rwanda is landlocked
Rwanda grid: 230 V, 50 Hz — appliance must be rated/labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz; plug/socket type to suit the market (confirm Type C / J / G)

summary.en: China's domestic grid is 220 V single phase / 380 V three phase at 50 Hz, with GB 1002 / GB 2099-series plug and socket types. Chinese refrigerators are built and rated for the domestic 220 V supply and carry Chinese plug types. There is no Chinese statutory requirement to appoint a foreign in-country importer for export goods; export logistics and the overseas distributor relationship are commercial arrangements. The shared 50 Hz frequency means the compressor/motor design transfers well to Rwanda, but the rating-plate voltage (220 V vs 230 V) and the plug type differ and must be addressed for the Rwandan market.
summary.zh: 中国国内电网为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz，采用GB 1002/GB 2099系列插头插座类型。中国电冰箱按国内220 V供电制造和额定，并配中国插头类型。中国对出口货物无指定外国当地进口商的法定要求；出口物流及海外经销商关系为商业安排。共享的50 Hz频率意味着压缩机/电机设计可良好移植至卢旺达，但铭牌电压（220 V对230 V）及插头类型不同，须针对卢旺达市场处理。
summary.zht: 中國國內電網為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz，採用GB 1002/GB 2099系列插頭插座類型。中國電冰箱按國內220 V供電製造和額定，並配中國插頭類型。中國對出口貨物無指定外國當地進口商的法定要求；出口物流及海外經銷商關係為商業安排。共享的50 Hz頻率意味著壓縮機/電機設計可良好移植至盧旺達，但銘牌電壓（220 V對230 V）及插頭類型不同，須針對盧旺達市場處理。

standards_or_laws: China grid: 220 V single phase / 380 V three phase, 50 Hz; GB 1002 / GB 2099-series plugs and sockets
No Chinese statutory in-country importer requirement for export goods — distributor relationship is commercial

gap.en: Three practical items: (1) In-country importer — Rwanda clearance requires a Rwanda-registered importer to present the CoC and handle destination inspection; the Chinese exporter cannot self-clear, so an importer (or local agent) must be in place before shipment. (2) Logistics and lead time — as a landlocked country, Rwanda is served via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam plus long inland road haul, so transit time, corridor choice, and inland documentation must be planned; this is a cost/lead-time gap, not a regulatory equivalence question. (3) Voltage and plug — the appliance must be rated and labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz (frequency matches China, so no motor redesign, but the 220 V rating plate should be updated to the 230 V nominal band) and fitted with a plug/cord suitable for Rwanda; verify the required plug type and any cord/marking rules with RSB. Rwanda has no EU-style horizontal regimes (RoHS, battery directive, outdoor-noise) — those EU obligations have no direct Rwanda equivalent and are not part of the Rwanda market-access package.
gap.zh: 三个实务项：（1）当地进口商——卢旺达清关须由卢旺达注册进口商出示合格证书并办理目的地查验；中国出口商不能自行清关，故出货前须落实进口商（或当地代理）。（2）物流与交期——作为内陆国，卢旺达经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆加长途内陆公路运输，故须规划运输时间、走廊选择及内陆单证；这是成本/交期差距，而非监管等同性问题。（3）电压与插头——器具须按230 V/50 Hz额定并标识（频率与中国一致，无需重新设计电机，但220 V铭牌应更新至230 V标称范围）并配适合卢旺达的插头/电源线；请向RSB核实所需插头类型及任何电源线/标识规则。卢旺达无类似欧盟的横向制度（RoHS、电池指令、户外噪声）——上述欧盟义务在卢旺达无直接对应，不属于卢旺达市场准入组合。
gap.zht: 三個實務項：（1）當地進口商——盧旺達清關須由盧旺達註冊進口商出示合格證書並辦理目的地查驗；中國出口商不能自行清關，故出貨前須落實進口商（或當地代理）。（2）物流與交期——作為內陸國，盧旺達經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆加長途內陸公路運輸，故須規劃運輸時間、走廊選擇及內陸單證；這是成本/交期差距，而非監管等同性問題。（3）電壓與插頭——器具須按230 V/50 Hz額定並標識（頻率與中國一致，無需重新設計電機，但220 V銘牌應更新至230 V標稱範圍）並配適合盧旺達的插頭/電源線；請向RSB核實所需插頭類型及任何電源線/標識規則。盧旺達無類似歐盟的橫向制度（RoHS、電池指令、戶外噪聲）——上述歐盟義務在盧旺達無直接對應，不屬於盧旺達市場准入組合。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in effect — a Rwanda-registered importer is needed for clearance/CoC presentation; appliances must be suitable and labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz with a market-appropriate plug. Logistics via Mombasa / Dar es Salaam is operational, not a certification, requirement
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China imposes no statutory in-country importer obligation for export goods; domestic grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz with Chinese plug types

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Practical Rwanda market entry needs a Rwanda-registered importer to present the RSB Certificate of Conformity, logistics planning via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam (landlocked country, long inland haul), and appliances rated/labelled for 230 V / 50 Hz with a market-appropriate plug. The 50 Hz frequency matches China so no motor redesign is needed; the 220 V vs 230 V rating and plug type are the items to update. Rwanda has no EU-style RoHS/battery/outdoor-noise horizontal regimes. verified:false — confirm importer, plug type, and corridor details with RSB and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达实务市场进入需要卢旺达注册进口商出示RSB合格证书、经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆的物流规划（内陆国，长途内陆运输），以及按230 V/50 Hz额定并标识、配适合市场插头的器具。50 Hz频率与中国一致，无需重新设计电机；220 V对230 V额定及插头类型是须更新的项目。卢旺达无类似欧盟的RoHS/电池/户外噪声横向制度。verified:false——请向RSB及进口商确认进口商、插头类型及走廊细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達實務市場進入需要盧旺達註冊進口商出示RSB合格證書、經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆的物流規劃（內陸國，長途內陸運輸），以及按230 V/50 Hz額定並標識、配適合市場插頭的器具。50 Hz頻率與中國一致，無需重新設計電機；220 V對230 V額定及插頭類型是須更新的項目。盧旺達無類似歐盟的RoHS/電池/戶外噪聲橫向制度。verified:false——請向RSB及進口商確認進口商、插頭類型及走廊細節。
